subject: Pricing for your Enterprise plan
body_text: Hi, we're a 50-person team looking for an enterprise solution. Can you send me pricing information and schedule a demo?

subject: Annual contract — 250 seats
body_text: Our renewal cycle starts in 6 weeks. We currently use a competitor with 250 seats. What's your enterprise tier and is there volume discounting at this scale?

subject: Startup discount?
body_text: Solo founder here, 3 contractors. Loved the product page. Do you offer a startup tier or any discounting for sub-10-person teams?

subject: Demo request — Tuesday or Wednesday
body_text: Can we get a 30-minute demo this week? Tuesday 10–12 PT or Wednesday afternoon both work. Looking specifically at the multi-warehouse feature.

subject: RFP response — Q3 procurement
body_text: We're issuing an RFP for inventory management. Please confirm you can complete a vendor questionnaire and provide SOC 2 documentation. Response deadline 30 days.

subject: Reseller program
body_text: We're a 12-person agency that manages tooling for ~40 SMB clients. Do you have a reseller or agency program with margin or referral fees?

subject: Is there a free tier?
body_text: Just stumbled on your product on HN. Is there a free or self-serve tier I can poke at, or is it all sales-led?

subject: Question about Shopify + NetSuite integration
body_text: Quick pre-sales question: does your platform sit between Shopify and NetSuite, or does it replace one of them? We have both and need to pick.

subject: Pricing for 10 stores
body_text: We operate 10 brick-and-mortar locations plus an online store. Can you walk me through how your multi-location pricing works?

subject: API access on the standard plan?
body_text: Looking at your standard tier — do we get API access at that level, or only on enterprise? We need it for our ERP sync.

subject: Education pricing
body_text: I'm starting a small e-commerce project as part of my MBA capstone. Do you offer education or non-profit pricing?

subject: ROI calculator and case studies
body_text: Trying to build a business case internally. Do you have an ROI calculator or 2–3 case studies from comparable SMBs?

subject: Intro from Sequoia portfolio company
body_text: Carla at Looplabs (Sequoia portfolio) said your product is what we should look at next. She suggested I reach out to start a conversation about onboarding.

subject: How do you compare to Square?
body_text: Hi, I'm running a 2-location bakery. Currently on Square. What would I gain (or lose) by switching to you?

subject: Bulk seat license for client deployments
body_text: Boutique consulting firm here. We deploy this kind of tool to clients as part of engagements. Do you have a bulk-seat licensing model we can resell?

subject: Migration support from Klaviyo
body_text: We're considering moving off Klaviyo. Do you offer migration assistance or services to help us bring across 40K contacts cleanly?

subject: Trial extension possible?
body_text: I'm in the middle of a trial but my evaluation got bumped a week. Can I get a 7-day extension to run the comparison properly?

subject: Average implementation timeline?
body_text: We're trying to plan Q1. From contract signature, what's the realistic median time to live for a 5-person ops team?

subject: Multi-property pricing
body_text: We own 6 boutique hotels across the southwest. Looking for a unified back-office tool. Can you put together a pricing proposal for 6 properties / ~80 users?

subject: Department-level pilot
body_text: Our parent company is on a competitor product but our department of 18 can pilot independently. Can we start with just our team without enterprise procurement?

subject: Embed your widget in our app?
body_text: We have ~5K SMB customers and would like to embed your widget in our app under our brand. Is there an OEM / embed program?

subject: ETA buyer due diligence — please confirm metrics
body_text: I'm an ETA searcher about to acquire a $4M ARR SMB that uses your platform. Can someone share aggregate metrics on retention/upgrades to help underwriting?

subject: Non-profit pricing inquiry
body_text: Registered 501(c)(3) running a regional food bank. Do you have non-profit pricing? Budget is tight but we'd benefit from a real tool.

subject: Security questionnaire — short form
body_text: Sales-led trial in progress. Our security team needs you to fill out a short questionnaire (10 questions) before we can connect prod data. Can you turn it around this week?

subject: POC scope question
body_text: Greenlit a 30-day POC. We want to test scheduling + reporting only. Can the SE limit the demo environment to those two modules?

subject: Can't log in after password reset
body_text: I followed the password reset link this morning, set a new password, but the login page keeps saying 'invalid credentials'. Account email is same as this one.

subject: Inventory sync failing
body_text: Since last Tuesday our Shopify→inventory sync is dropping 5–10% of orders. Job runs but rows are missing. Job ID is sync-2026-05-22-0814.

subject: Reports not exporting
body_text: Trying to export the monthly sales report to CSV and it just spins. Tried Chrome and Firefox. Same result. Could really use this for a board meeting Thursday.

subject: Mobile app crashing on scan
body_text: Whole warehouse team is stuck. The mobile scanner app crashes every time we scan an item starting this morning. We're falling behind on receiving. Help?

subject: Need to revoke an API key I lost track of
body_text: I generated 4 API keys at different times and lost track of which is which. How do I rotate or revoke without breaking the active integration?

subject: Two-factor not sending codes
body_text: SMS-based 2FA stopped delivering codes since yesterday. Authenticator app still works for me but my coworker only has SMS set up.

subject: Subscriber import — duplicate handling
body_text: Importing 1,200 subscribers from a Mailchimp export. About 80 already exist in the system. How do I tell the importer to skip dupes vs update them?

subject: How do I change my account email?
body_text: I want to change my login email to a new one. I see 'change email' but it asks for a verification code that never arrives.

subject: Webhook 500s after upgrade
body_text: After last week's upgrade, ~20% of our webhooks are returning 500. URL hasn't changed. Worked fine before the upgrade. Need help diagnosing.

subject: Discount code not applying at checkout
body_text: Customers can apply our discount code but it's not actually taking the percentage off the total. We've lost 3 sales this morning because customers gave up.

subject: User permissions question
body_text: I need to give my warehouse manager edit access on inventory but not billing. The role builder is confusing — can someone walk me through it?

subject: Stripe payouts not showing in dashboard
body_text: Stripe shows the payouts but they haven't appeared in our finance dashboard for the last 3 days. Stripe webhook in their dashboard shows success. What's happening on your side?

subject: Mobile app stuck on splash screen
body_text: iOS app updated to v3.2.1 last night and now just shows the splash screen forever. Other team members on Android are fine.

subject: How do I download a specific month's invoice?
body_text: I need April 2026's invoice to attach to an expense report. The invoices page only shows the last 3 months and April isn't there anymore.

subject: Two users seeing different reports
body_text: My ops lead and I are looking at the same 'orders this week' report but seeing different totals. Are filters cached per user? How do I align them?

subject: SAML SSO assertion errors
body_text: Our IT just rolled SAML out to your app. About 30% of users hit 'SAML assertion invalid'. Other apps using the same IdP are fine. Need help comparing assertion configs.

subject: Bulk update — UI vs API?
body_text: Need to update SKUs on 800 products (price increase). The UI bulk-edit only allows 100 at a time. Is there an API or import-CSV path for this?

subject: Refund processed but customer not notified
body_text: Refunded a customer 3 days ago, money went out, but the customer says they never got the refund-confirmation email. Did the email job fail or did I configure something wrong?

subject: Set up auto-replies?
body_text: Hoping for a step-by-step on configuring an auto-reply for inbound support tickets after hours. Couldn't find it in the docs.

subject: Importing CSV fails on column mapping
body_text: Trying to import customers. The mapping step keeps saying 'column 'phone' invalid'. Phone column exists and looks fine. Sample row attached.

subject: Page load slow today
body_text: The dashboard is taking 8–12 seconds to load this morning. Was fast yesterday. Status page is green. Just want to confirm it's known.

subject: Same email triggering 3 notifications
body_text: Every customer signup triggers 3 confirmation emails instead of 1. Started Friday. We didn't change anything on our side. Can you investigate?

subject: Custom field disappeared from form
body_text: We added a 'birthday' custom field two months ago. It's now missing from our intake form. Field still exists in the schema. UI bug?

subject: Where do I find my account ID?
body_text: Need my account ID for a third-party integration. I don't see it anywhere obvious in settings. Can you point me at it?

subject: Timezone showing wrong on reports
body_text: All our reports show timestamps in UTC even though our org is set to America/Chicago. Already checked the org settings — they're correct.

subject: Question about last month's invoice
body_text: I see two line items for the same plan on my April invoice. Can you confirm whether that's intentional or a duplicate?

subject: Annual vs monthly pricing
body_text: Currently on monthly. Considering switching to annual. Is there a discount and how does the proration work mid-cycle?

subject: Need W-9 for our vendor records
body_text: Our AP team is setting you up as a vendor in our system. Can you send the latest W-9?

subject: How do I update credit card on file?
body_text: Need to swap to a new corporate card. The settings page says 'card on file' but I can't see how to update it.

subject: Tax not being charged on EU invoices
body_text: We have customers in Germany. Our invoices don't show VAT. Is that something I need to enable per-region or do you handle it?

subject: Pause subscription for 2 months?
body_text: Going through a quiet summer. Is there a way to pause my subscription for 8 weeks rather than cancelling and resuming?

subject: Charged on day 1 of trial
body_text: Started a 14-day trial yesterday. Already see a charge for the monthly plan. Was the trial canceled or did I miss something?

subject: Bulk invoice export for our auditor
body_text: Annual audit. Auditor needs all 12 monthly invoices as PDF in one zip. Can you generate that on the billing portal or do you need to send it?

subject: Confused about overage charges
body_text: April bill includes a $40 'overage' line. I don't see anywhere in the app that explains what we went over. Can you break it down?

subject: Apply non-profit discount retroactively?
body_text: We just signed up last week and paid first month full price. I see you have non-profit pricing. Can you apply it going forward and refund the difference on this cycle?

subject: Downgrade question
body_text: We want to go from Growth tier to Starter at the end of the cycle. Does that take effect immediately on the renewal date, or do I lose features now?

subject: Receipt format for reimbursement
body_text: My employer reimburses me but the receipt you send has my personal name on it. Can it be addressed to the company name instead?

subject: ACH instead of credit card?
body_text: Annual invoice is sizable and credit card fees add up. Can we pay by ACH or wire? What's the process?

subject: Sales tax exemption on file
body_text: We're a registered reseller in Texas. How do I upload our resale certificate so future invoices skip sales tax?

subject: Payment terms — net 30?
body_text: Our AP team only pays vendors on net-30. The portal seems to demand payment within 7 days. Can our account be flipped to net-30 billing?

subject: Annual renewal price increase
body_text: Our renewal quote came back 12% higher than last year. Can you walk me through what changed? I'd like to budget accurately.

subject: Where to find historical invoices?
body_text: I need invoices from 18 months ago for our finance team. Billing portal only shows 12 months. Where do I get older ones?

subject: Add a PO number to invoices
body_text: Our procurement requires a PO number on every invoice. Where do I store the PO so it shows up on future invoices?

subject: Refund for accidental upgrade
body_text: I accidentally clicked the upgrade button last night and got bumped to the next tier (and charged for it). Can you reverse the upgrade and refund?

subject: Match invoice line to plan
body_text: The invoice says 'Platform Standard — 3 seats' but in the app we have 5 seats configured. Why the mismatch?

subject: Card declined — please retry
body_text: Got an email saying my card was declined. I updated the card. Will the system automatically retry or do I need to manually re-trigger?

subject: Prorate on plan change
body_text: Going from monthly Starter to monthly Growth mid-cycle. Will I be charged the difference now or at next renewal?

subject: Currency on invoices
body_text: Our invoices come in USD but we operate in Canada. Can future invoices be in CAD, or do we have to do FX conversion in our books?

subject: Plan includes how many users?
body_text: Trying to add a 6th user and the system says my plan only includes 5. Is there a per-seat add-on price or do I need to upgrade the whole plan?

subject: VAT number on EU invoices
body_text: Could you add our UK VAT number to the company info so it shows on invoices? Our accountant needs it for the books.

subject: Boost your sales pipeline with our CRM
body_text: We help SMBs like yours triple their lead conversion. Quick 15-min demo this week to show you how?

subject: Integration partnership opportunity
body_text: I lead partnerships at AnalyticsCo. Our customers ask for an integration with your platform regularly. Open to a brief call about a joint integration?

subject: Quick win — automated dashboards for your ops team
body_text: Hi! I'm Daria from BizData. We built a Looker-style tool specifically for SMBs. Worth 15 minutes to see if there's a fit?

subject: Sponsor our 2026 SMB Ops Summit
body_text: We're organizing the third annual SMB Ops Summit (Sept 2026, 1,200 attendees). Sponsorship packages start at $5K. Interested in receiving the prospectus?

subject: Disaster recovery for SMB SaaS
body_text: We provide point-in-time DR snapshots for SMB SaaS platforms. Several of your competitors use us. Open to a chat about how it works?

subject: Procurement software referral program
body_text: We run a referral program for SMB-focused SaaS. Earn $200 per qualified referral. Quick call to see if it makes sense for your customer base?

subject: Channel partner program
body_text: I run channel partnerships at Vendor. We've signed 30+ SMB-focused tools as fulfillment partners in the past year. Would love to introduce the program.

subject: Increase signups 20% with our paid acquisition stack
body_text: We've helped 50+ SMB SaaS companies grow paid signups 20%+. Quick discovery call next week?

subject: Speaking slot at SaaSCon 2026
body_text: I'm curating the SMB track at SaaSCon. Would your CEO be interested in a 30-min talk on multi-cloud ops? October dates.

subject: Cheaper egress for SMB SaaS
body_text: We provide bandwidth + egress at 60% of AWS prices for SMB SaaS. Worth 10 minutes to see if there's room to reduce your infra spend?

subject: SOC 2 Type II — fast track program
body_text: We help SMB SaaS get SOC 2 Type II in under 90 days. Many of your peers have used us. Want details?

subject: AI chatbot for your support team
body_text: AI chat agent that resolves 40%+ of L1 tickets autonomously. Several SMB platforms similar to yours are seeing huge deflection numbers. Open to a demo?

subject: Embedded payments for your platform
body_text: We offer embedded payment processing for SMB platforms. Your customers could accept payments without leaving your app. Conversation?

subject: AI-generated docs for your knowledge base
body_text: Hi — we help SMB SaaS auto-generate help-center content from their codebase. Average save: 200 hours of docs writing. Worth a chat?

subject: Strategic alliance — joint go-to-market
body_text: Patrick from GlobalCRM here. We've identified an overlap in our SMB customer base. Strategic conversation about co-marketing or technical integration?

subject: Cyber insurance for SMB SaaS — 12% off
body_text: Specialized cyber liability coverage for SMB SaaS. 12% off through end of quarter. Want a quote?

subject: Get more G2 reviews
body_text: We help SMB SaaS run review-collection campaigns that 5x G2 reviews in 60 days. Worth seeing the process?

subject: Outsource your QA — SE Asia team
body_text: We offer dedicated QA pods (4–6 testers) at SE Asia rates. Several SMB SaaS peers use us. Open to a discovery call?

subject: B2B influencer program — SMB founders
body_text: We connect SaaS tools with 200+ SMB-founder influencers on LinkedIn. Typical engagement campaign is $12K and generates 80–150 qualified leads. Pitch deck?

subject: Customer data enrichment
body_text: We enrich SMB SaaS customer data (employee count, tech stack, funding) for free-tier segmentation. Want a sample on 100 of your customers?

subject: Fractional COO for SMB SaaS
body_text: Hi! I run a fractional COO firm focused on SMB SaaS at $1–10M ARR. Several of our clients hit profitability inside 6 months. Curious if you're at a relevant stage?

subject: Payroll integration — referral fees
body_text: We pay $250 per referred SMB that signs for our payroll service. Want to see the partner program?

subject: GDPR and CCPA in 30 days
body_text: Compliance-as-a-service for SMB SaaS. GDPR + CCPA ready in 30 days. Open to a 15-minute walkthrough?

subject: BI tool — free for first 10K rows/month
body_text: We offer a BI tool free up to 10K rows/month for SMB SaaS. Wanted to put it on your radar — happy to send a 1-pager.

subject: Translate your product into 30 languages
body_text: We translate SMB SaaS interfaces into 30 languages with native QA at a flat rate. Wanted to introduce ourselves in case localization is on your roadmap.

subject: Application for Senior Backend Engineer
body_text: Attached is my resume for the Senior Backend role. 8 years of Python / Go, ex-Stripe. Available to start in 4 weeks.

subject: Interested in your customer success role
body_text: Saw your CS opening on LinkedIn. 6 years at HubSpot and Intercom. Resume attached, happy to schedule a chat.

subject: Frontend engineer — quick intro
body_text: Two-line pitch: ex-Vercel frontend engineer, shipped the design system at my last 3 roles. Open to the React role.

subject: Re: Engineering Manager opening
body_text: Following up on my application last week for the EM role. Wanted to confirm receipt and ask whether I can expect to hear back in the next two weeks.

subject: Strong product manager candidate for you
body_text: I'm a tech recruiter at TalentFirm. I have a senior PM who's currently at Box and wants to move into SMB SaaS. Worth a 15-minute chat to share details?

subject: Summer 2026 internship inquiry
body_text: Rising senior CS at UCLA. Looking for a backend internship for summer 2026. Resume attached. Would value a chance to contribute to your platform.

subject: Application — DevOps Engineer
body_text: Resume + cover letter attached. 5 years AWS + 3 years Kubernetes. Excited about the multi-cloud direction your job post mentioned.

subject: QA Engineer — application materials
body_text: Hi! Applying for the QA role. 7 years in test automation. Selenium, Playwright, Cypress experience. CV attached.

subject: Product Designer interested
body_text: I love what your design team has shipped — clean, opinionated, calm. I'm applying for the Senior PD role. Portfolio link in signature.

subject: Salesforce Admin — open to your team
body_text: Came across your SFDC admin posting via Hired. 4+ years admin/dev, currently at a 200-person SMB SaaS. Resume attached.

subject: Sourcing intro — Engineering candidate
body_text: Hi, I'm a sourcer at TopGigs. I have a Bay Area senior engineer with FAANG experience looking for SMB SaaS. Open to a 20-min intro?

subject: Following up on Marketing Manager role
body_text: Submitted for Marketing Manager 3 weeks ago — wanted to check in politely. Excited about the role, totally understand if timing is off.

subject: Application — Customer Support Lead
body_text: Applying for the Customer Support Lead opening. 9 years CS experience, last 4 leading a 12-person team. CV in PDF attached.

subject: Recent bootcamp grad — junior engineer interest
body_text: I'm a recent App Academy graduate (Jan 2026) interested in your junior engineer role. Portfolio + GitHub in signature. Happy to do a take-home.

subject: Sales — quota-carrying SDR experience
body_text: 12 quarters carrying a quota at Salesloft. 6 attaining 110%+. Applying for your AE role. CV attached, references on request.

subject: Technical writer application
body_text: Tech writer with 7 years SaaS experience. Built knowledge bases at Datadog and Linear. CV + 3 writing samples attached.

subject: Open to your DataOps role
body_text: Currently at a 500-person SMB SaaS doing DataOps. Snowflake, dbt, Airflow. Looking to move to a smaller team. CV attached.

subject: Following up — final round?
body_text: I had my fourth round last Thursday for the Senior SRE role. Wanted to politely check in on next steps — I'm holding a competing offer until Friday.

subject: Engineering candidate — reply when you have time
body_text: Tech recruiter representing a strong staff engineer. Background: ex-Stripe, ex-Affirm. Open to a 10-min screening intro?

subject: Application — UX Researcher
body_text: Applying for the UX Researcher position. 6 years SaaS, mixed quant/qual. CV + research portfolio attached.

subject: New grad — open to PM associate role
body_text: Stanford MBA grad (June 2026). Pre-MBA: 4 years at Square as APM then PM. Applying for the PM Associate posting. CV attached.

subject: Senior Recruiter — open to your search
body_text: Currently a senior recruiter at a Series C SaaS. Closing 4–6 engineers/quarter. Applying for your in-house recruiting lead position.

subject: Re: Site Reliability Engineer role
body_text: SRE with 10 years at scale (Cloudflare). Comfortable with multi-cloud. Resume attached. Available immediately.

subject: Account executive — quick intro
body_text: AE with 5 years SMB-focused SaaS sales (Gusto, Brex). Applying for the AE role posted last week. Resume attached.

subject: Career-changer — entry support role
body_text: Career-changing from 8 years in retail management. Applying for the entry-level support role. Cover letter explains the transition.

subject: 📈 5 ways to grow your business this quarter
body_text: Read our latest blog post on growth strategies. Plus, get our free ebook on customer acquisition. [Unsubscribe]

subject: [Webinar] How AI is transforming SMB ops
body_text: Join us May 30 at 1pm ET for a live webinar. Free registration. Recording available afterward. [Unsubscribe at the bottom of this email]

subject: Your weekly B2B insights
body_text: This week: 5 SaaS metrics every founder should know, plus a deep dive on PLG vs sales-led. Read more: [link] [Unsubscribe]

subject: 🚀 LIMITED TIME — 40% off all plans
body_text: For the next 48 hours only — 40% off any annual plan. Use code SUMMER40 at checkout. Limited time offer. [unsubscribe]

subject: Daily digest — your industry briefing
body_text: Today's headlines: cloud spending up 12% YoY, Apple announces new dev tools, OpenAI ships a new tier. [Read full digest] [Unsubscribe]

subject: 📕 New ebook: The 2026 SMB SaaS playbook
body_text: Just published — our 60-page playbook on running an SMB SaaS in 2026. Free download with email signup. [download] [unsubscribe]

subject: 🎟️ Early bird tickets close Friday
body_text: Don't miss SaaSWorld 2026 — early bird tickets ($499) close this Friday. After Friday, $799. [Register]

subject: Your monthly snack box ships tomorrow!
body_text: Hi! Your June snack box ships tomorrow morning. Need to skip this month? Click here to skip by 5pm today.

subject: ⚡ Flash Sale — ends in 4 hours
body_text: Up to 70% off select office gear. Hurry! Ends 5pm Pacific. Shop now.

subject: This week in venture
body_text: Top funding rounds, founder interviews, and the VC fund-of-funds debate. Subscribe to read more.

subject: Save 30% on cloud infrastructure
body_text: Move to our cloud platform and save 30% on infra spend in year 1. Limited-time offer for new accounts.

subject: New: How to scale customer support in 2026
body_text: Just published! Our latest guide on scaling support without scaling team. 12-minute read. Comments open.

subject: Quick question, [first_name]
body_text: Hey, just checking in — did you see the email I sent on Monday? Wanted to make sure it didn't get buried. [unsubscribe]

subject: 🎙️ New episode: Building a moat in SMB SaaS
body_text: Latest episode is live — 47 minutes with the founder of TopSMB. Listen on Spotify, Apple, or YouTube.

subject: 📚 Master B2B sales — 25% off this week
body_text: Our most popular course on B2B sales is 25% off for the next 7 days. 1,200 graduates and counting.

subject: Reminder: SMB Summit 2026 — June 15
body_text: Just a reminder that SMB Summit 2026 is two weeks away. Register today to secure your seat. Limited space.

subject: 🛠️ This week's top SMB tools
body_text: We rounded up the top 10 SMB tools launching this week. Read the list. [unsubscribe in footer]

subject: Daily finance brief
body_text: Top economic and finance stories of the day. 5-minute read. [subscribe / unsubscribe]

subject: 🎓 Free workshop — pricing strategy
body_text: Free online workshop next Wednesday on pricing strategy. Register today, recording available afterward.

subject: 🌟 Your hosting renewal is due
body_text: Your hosting plan auto-renews in 7 days. Click here to manage your subscription or change plan.

subject: Get 1,000 verified leads — limited offer
body_text: 1,000 verified B2B leads for $199 (regular $799). 24 hours only. Click to buy.

subject: 🎉 You've been subscribed
body_text: You've been added to the SubWithMe weekly digest. We send 1 email per week, every Thursday. Welcome!

subject: $100 free ad credit for new accounts
body_text: Spin up an account and get $100 free to spend on your first campaign. No credit card required.

subject: Following up
body_text: Hi, just bumping this back to the top of your inbox. Did my last email reach you? Worth 5 minutes? [unsubscribe]

subject: 🚀 New product launch — meet Tooly
body_text: We just launched Tooly, our new SMB growth platform. Try it free for 30 days. Watch the launch video.

subject: Order #12345 STILL not received - this is unacceptable
body_text: I placed order 12345 three weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. I've called twice and nobody helps. If this isn't resolved TODAY I'm disputing the charge and leaving a 1-star review everywhere.

subject: Your software is broken AGAIN
body_text: This is the third time this month your software has crashed and lost my work. I am paying $200/month for this garbage. Fix it or I'm canceling and going to your competitors. My account is #TRK-8823.

subject: Notice of potential legal action
body_text: This firm represents a client who believes your company has engaged in deceptive business practices. We request a response within 10 business days to avoid formal legal proceedings.

subject: Overcharged TWICE this month
body_text: I've been charged $99 twice this billing cycle. I want a refund immediately. This is fraud. I'll contact my bank if you don't respond today.

subject: Cease and desist demand
body_text: We represent Riverstone Inc. Your platform is publishing content that infringes our client's registered trademarks. You have 5 business days to comply or we will file in federal court.

subject: Consumer complaint — formal response required
body_text: A consumer complaint has been filed against your company (case #2026-CA-4421). Under state law you have 14 days to provide a formal response. Failure to do so triggers an investigation.

subject: Press inquiry — security incident
body_text: I'm a reporter at BigBlog. We have multiple sources reporting customer data exposure on your platform last week. We're publishing Wednesday. Please respond by EOD Monday with comment or we will note 'declined to comment'.

subject: I'm posting this on Twitter tomorrow
body_text: I've been your customer for 2 years. The way your support team treated me yesterday was unacceptable. Unless someone with authority calls me by noon, I'm posting the whole transcript on Twitter — and I have 45K followers.

subject: Canceling — effective immediately
body_text: After repeated unresolved issues and being ignored on Slack support for 6 days, we are terminating our contract effective immediately. Our legal team will be in touch about prorated refund and data export.

subject: My account was hacked — please act NOW
body_text: Someone got into my account at 3am and changed the bank account. Two transfers totaling $4,200 went out. I need this frozen immediately and the transfers reversed. This is a security emergency.

subject: Patient safety issue — your scheduling tool
body_text: Your scheduling tool has caused a double-booking that affected a patient appointment yesterday. This is a patient-safety concern. I need confirmation today that the bug is identified and fixed.

subject: SOC 2 violation in your hosted service
body_text: Our SOC 2 audit found evidence that your platform is logging credit card data in plaintext. This is an SLA breach under our MSA. We need a remediation plan within 72 hours or we are escalating to our legal team.

subject: Tell my customers something or we lose them
body_text: Your outage today has cost us 50+ orders. Customers are calling angry. I will file a chargeback for this month's service AND post about this everywhere. Need a status update within the hour.

subject: SLA breach — invoking termination clause
body_text: Per our MSA section 8.3, this is formal notice we are invoking the SLA termination clause. Uptime below 99.5% for two consecutive months. We will be off your platform within 30 days. Prepare for data export.

subject: Resolve by 5pm or I dispute with Amex
body_text: I've been told three times this would be fixed. It's not. I'm done waiting. Resolve by 5pm today or I dispute this month's $1,800 charge with Amex. This is your last chance.

subject: BBB complaint being filed today
body_text: Filing a Better Business Bureau complaint this afternoon. We've been billed $8K incorrectly for two months and your billing team is unresponsive. I want a refund and a written apology by tomorrow EOD.

subject: Your equipment data is wrong — safety risk
body_text: Your inventory record for our excavator shows last maintenance Feb 2025. Actual maintenance was Feb 2024. We are using this for compliance logs. An OSHA inspection is Friday. We need this corrected immediately.

subject: Potential PHI exposure — respond today
body_text: We received reports that one of our clinicians' accounts has been displaying another clinic's PHI. This is a potential HIPAA breach. We need confirmation by EOD today and a root-cause analysis within 5 business days.

subject: Effective immediately — terminating
body_text: Two unfixed P0s in a row. We are terminating effective immediately and moving to a competitor. Our finance team will deal with refund and data export questions. Do not contact me on this account again.

subject: Demand letter — refund and damages
body_text: This office represents 47 consumers harmed by your platform's bug between March and April. Demand letter attached. Demanding full refunds plus statutory damages. 21 days to respond before we file as a class action.

subject: Last warning before we leave
body_text: We've been patient. Two months of stalling. If our P0 is not resolved by Friday close of business we are terminating our contract and disputing all remaining invoices. We have a 47-page incident log if you want it.

subject: Going public on LinkedIn
body_text: Your team has ghosted me for 11 days on a P0 outage. I'm a founder with 30K LinkedIn followers — fellow SaaS founders. I'm writing a full post tomorrow if no one calls me today. This will hurt your funnel.

subject: Production data corruption — emergency
body_text: Your last update corrupted 30% of our production data. We are losing customers in real time. This is a P0. Need an emergency call within the hour or we are filing for breach of contract.

subject: Filing chargeback this afternoon
body_text: I've been overcharged for 4 months. Each time your team promises to fix it and never does. I'm filing a chargeback with Chase for the cumulative $1,600 this afternoon unless you can prove the refund is processing within 2 hours.

subject: Public review going up Monday
body_text: I've documented every interaction over 90 days. Your team has been dismissive, your product has cost us 3 customers, and your CEO refuses to call back. I'm publishing a detailed Trustpilot, Capterra, and G2 review on Monday. Last chance to address before then.

subject: Undeliverable mail
body_text: Your email could not be delivered. SMTP error 550: mailbox unavailable. Return-path: <postmaster@example.com>.

subject: Auto: Out of office until June 15
body_text: I am out of the office returning June 15. For urgent matters, contact my assistant at assistant@cust.com. This is an automated reply.

subject: test
body_text: test

subject: FYI
body_text: FYI
I don't know what this is for. Sorry. Maybe this email got sent to the wrong place. Disregard.

subject: Increase your revenue dear sir/madam
body_text: Dear sir/madam, we provide all the things business needs. Please reply to discuss your project. Many thanks.

subject: Event reminder: Lunch
body_text: Lunch — Today at 12:30pm — Office Cafe. Reminder set 30 minutes before.

subject: Your password was used
body_text: We noticed your password was used to sign in to a service from Chrome on macOS at 14:22 UTC. If this was you, no action is needed.

subject: URGENT URGENT URGENT URGENT URGENT
body_text: Hi i think you have what i want pls call me

subject: [acme/repo] PR opened: Fix typo in README
body_text: User jdoe opened pull request #142 against main: Fix typo in README. Reply to merge or comment.

subject: Hi
body_text: Hi

subject: Where are you?
body_text: Where are you? Has it been long?

subject: Reminder: subscription renews soon
body_text: This is a system notification about your Spotify Family subscription renewing next week. No action required.

subject: Confidential business proposal
body_text: Dear esteemed beneficiary, I am a prince from somewhere and I have $25 million USD to transfer to your account. Please reply with your bank details.

subject: We need actors for our community play
body_text: Our community theatre is looking for volunteer actors for our June production of Hamlet. No experience required.

subject: lost cat
body_text: Have you seen my cat? Tabby, missing since Tuesday. Comes when called for Pickles.

subject: Your flight UA-2245 has been delayed
body_text: Your flight UA-2245 from SFO to JFK on June 3 has been delayed 45 minutes. New departure: 16:25 PDT.

subject: Wedding photos!
body_text: Hi mom! Attaching the photos from cousin Sarah's wedding. Tell dad I said hi! Love you!

subject: I don't think this is right
body_text: Something doesn't seem right but I can't tell what. Maybe nothing. Please ignore.

subject: {{first_name}}
body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, hope all is well at {{company_name}}. {{personalized_intro}}.

subject: Your support ticket is closed
body_text: Support ticket #SR-99812 has been marked closed. If you need to reopen, reply to this email.

subject: Re: your inquiry
body_text: Thank you for contacting our team. We will respond within 2 business days. — Automated response, do not reply.

subject: All-hands meeting tomorrow
body_text: Reminder to the entire ACME engineering organization — tomorrow's all-hands is at 10am Pacific in the SF office. — Sent to engineering@acme.com.

subject: I have something to tell you
body_text: I have something I want to share with you but I'm not sure how. Maybe I'll figure it out. Bye for now.
